notes: Solid rubber per MIL-DTL-11462 (natural/SBR compound). Density ~1.2 g/cm³, Shore A ~60-70. RHAe ~0.06-0.10 per mm vs KE. Used in vehicle track pads, side skirts, and spacing/filter layers. Negligible structural ballistic protection but useful for HEAT standoff and spaced armor disruption.

source.methodology: RHAe estimated from rubber density and durometer hardness relative to typical ballistic fabrics. Density and hardness per MIL-DTL-11462.
